loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and derived H5/H7 values — per-phase current THD is measured, but voltage THD, flicker, and crest factor are not logged by this APFCR meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) evolution — voltage THD and harmonic order (H5/H7) data are not measured by this asset.
